front.title: Updates to Locally Served DNS Zones and IP Special-Purpose Address Space Registries

abstract.t: RFC 6063, "Locally Served DNS Zones", defines two IANA registries called "IPv4 Locally-Served DNS Zone" and "IPv6 Locally-Served DNS Zone" registries. This document changes the registration policy for that registry from "IETF Review" to "Expert Review".

Also, this document updates IP Special-Purpose Address Space registries to indicate whether an IP address block is eligible to be in Locally-Served DNS Zones. Eligible entries will be automatically added to the Locally-Served DNS Zones.
This document updates RFC 6063 and RFC 6890.

section.name: Introduction
section.t: "Locally Served DNS Zones", it defines two IANA registries called "IPv4 Locally-Served DNS Zone" and "IPv6 Locally-Served DNS Zone" registries. This document changes the registration policy for that registry from "IETF Review" to "Expert Review".

Also, this document updates IP Special-Purpose Address Space registries {{!RFC6890}} to indicate whether an IP address block is eligible to be in Locally-Served DNS Zones. This change is meant to ensure consistent registrations between the above registries and future failures to make appropriate registrations in "IPv6 Locally-Served DNS Zone" such as in {{!RFC9637}}.
PLEASE REMOVE THE FOLLOWING PARAGRAPH BEFORE PUBLISHING: The source for this draft is maintained on GitHub at: https://github.com/moonshiner/draft-dnsop-rfc6303-bis

section.name: Terminology
section.t: The key words "MUST", "MUST NOT", "REQUIRED", "SHALL", "SHALL NOT", "SHOULD", "SHOULD NOT", "RECOMMENDED", "NOT RECOMMENDED", "MAY", and "OPTIONAL" in this document are to be interpreted as described in BCP 14 when, and only when, they appear in all capitals, as shown here. DNS terminology is as described in .

section.name: Updates to RFC 6063
section.t: Please update {{Section 8 of @!RFC6303}} "IANA Considerations" as follows:
OLD:
{:quote}

blockquote.t: This registry can be amended through "IETF Review" as per {{?RFC5226}}. As part of this review process, it should be noted that once a zone is added it is effectively added permanently; once an address range starts being configured as a local zone in systems on the Internet, it will be impossible to reverse those changes.

section.t: NEW:
{:quote}

blockquote.t: This registry can be amended through "Expert Review" policy ({{Section 4.5 of !RFC8126}}). As part of this review process, it should be noted that once a zone is added it is effectively added permanently; once an address range starts being configured as a local zone in systems on the Internet, it will be impossible to reverse those changes. More guidance for Designated Experts is provided in {{guidance}} of THIS_DOCUMENT.

section.name: Guidance for Designated Experts
section.t: In changing the approval to "Expert Review", there should be some additional guidance. Here are some examples (not all mandatory) on what the Reviewer should look for:

li.t: Should have at least an internet-draft written which can explain the usage.
The various Working Groups in the IETF should have

section.name: Changes to the IPv6 Locally-Served DNS Zones Registry
section.t: IANA is requested to add the zones listed below to the "IPv6 Locally-Served DNS Zone" registry:
TBC with {{!RFC9637}} entries.

section.name: Changes to the IP Special-Purpose Space Registries
Eligible to Locally-Served DNS Zones New Column
section.t: IANA is requested to add a new column, Eligible to Locally-Served DNS Zones, to the "IPv6 Special-Purpose Address Space" and "IPv4 Special-Purpose Address Space" registries.

section.name: Eligible to Locally-Served DNS Zones Note
section.t: IANA is requested to add the following note to the "IPv6 Special-Purpose Address Space" and "IPv4 Special-Purpose Address Space" registries:

dl.dd: A boolean value indicating whether the IP address block is to be added to the Locally-Served DNS Zones IANA registry.

section.name: IPv6 Locally-Served DNS Zone Registry Note
section.t: IANA is requested to add the following note to the "IPv6 Special-Purpose Address Space" registry:

dl.dd: IANA has to add relevant entries for "Eligible to Locally-Served DNS Zones" set to "True" in the IPv6 Locally-Served DNS Zone Registry.

section.name: IPv4 Locally-Served DNS Zone Registry Note
section.t: IANA is requested to add the following note to the "IPv4 Special-Purpose Address Space" registry:

dl.dd: IANA has to add relevant entries for "Eligible to Locally-Served DNS Zones" set to "True" in the IPv4 Locally-Served DNS Zone Registry.

section.name: Initial IPv6 Locally-Served DNS Zone Registry
section.t: TBC.

section.name: Initial IPv4 Locally-Served DNS Zone Registry
section.t: TBC.

section.name: Operational Considerations
section.t: TBC.

section.name: Security Considerations
section.t: This document does not add new security risks other than those already discussed in {{RFC6303}}, {{!RFC6890}}, and {{!RFC9637}}.

section.name: IANA Considerations
section.t: Sections 6063-updates and 6890-updates include actions for IANA. These actions are not repeated here.
